step_rationale: Oxidative stress reducer; protects against plaque inflammation and cardiomyocyte injury.
mechanism: Methionine sulfoxide reductase A reduces oxidative stress in atherosclerotic plaques and ischemic myocardium, limiting inflammation-driven plaque destabilization and cardiomyocyte damage.

references.title: Identification of gene variants related to the nitric oxide pathway in patients with acute coronary syndrome.
